revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Description == It is to indicate whether it can be safely used in citation templates. By default, it indicates the template is safe for use. When the template is set as "not safe", the page is placed into {{cl|Templates not safe for use in citation templates}}. To [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|suppress categorization]], use parameter {{para|nocat|true}}. == Usage == To indicate a template which can be safely used in citation templates: {{COinS safe}} To indicate a template that should '''NOT''' be used in citation templates: {{COinS safe|n}} To add extra info after the standard message: {{para|addtext}} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" |- !style="width: 25%;"| Code !! Result |- | {{tlx|COinS safe}} || {{COinS safe}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|n}} || {{COinS safe|n}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|addtext{{=}}Here is the extra info.}} || {{COinS safe|addtext=Here is the extra info.}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|n|addtext{{=}}Here is the extra info.}} || {{COinS safe|n|addtext=Here is the extra info.}} |} == Explain COinS issues == Citation templates such as {{cs1}} and {{cs2}} generate COinS metadata. If a template is used in a citation template field, then it may inject HTML into the metadata. Compare the rendered HTML for {{tl|cite book}} with {{para|author}} using no template and using {{tl|smallcaps}}. {| |- | {{markup |{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}} |{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}} {{code|{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}}}} |{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title}} |{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title | template-doc-demo=true}} {{code|{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title}}}} }} |} The author metadata is in the {{code|rft.aulast}} field. In this case, it is percent-encoded and is rendered as Sam Drucker Reference management software will interpret the entire span as the author name. == See also == * [[w:Wikipedia:Citation templates|Wikipedia:Citation templates]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Notice and warning templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} == Description == It is to indicate whether it can be safely used in citation templates. By default, it indicates the template is safe for use. When the template is set as "not safe", the page is placed into {{cl|Templates not safe for use in citation templates}}. To [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|suppress categorization]], use parameter {{para|nocat|true}}. == Usage == To indicate a template which can be safely used in citation templates: {{COinS safe}} To indicate a template that should '''NOT''' be used in citation templates: {{COinS safe|n}} To add extra info after the standard message: {{para|addtext}} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" |- !style="width: 25%;"| Code !! Result |- | {{tlx|COinS safe}} || {{COinS safe}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|n}} || {{COinS safe|n}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|addtext{{=}}Here is the extra info.}} || {{COinS safe|addtext=Here is the extra info.}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|n|addtext{{=}}Here is the extra info.}} || {{COinS safe|n|addtext=Here is the extra info.}} |} == Explain COinS issues == Citation templates such as {{cs1}} and {{cs2}} generate COinS metadata. If a template is used in a citation template field, then it may inject HTML into the metadata. Compare the rendered HTML for {{tl|cite book}} with {{para|author}} using no template and using {{tl|smallcaps}}. {| |- | {{markup |{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}} |{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}} {{code|{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}}}} |{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title}} |{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title | template-doc-demo=true}} {{code|{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title}}}} }} |} The author metadata is in the {{code|rft.aulast}} field. In this case, it is percent-encoded and is rendered as Sam Drucker Reference management software will interpret the entire span as the author name. == See also == * [[w:Wikipedia:Citation templates|Wikipedia:Citation templates]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Notice and warning templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=COinS_safe%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Description == It is to indicate whether it can be safely used in citation templates. By default, it indicates the template is safe for use. When the template is set as "not safe", the page is placed into {{cl|Templates not safe for use in citation templates}}. To [[Wikipedia:Category suppression|suppress categorization]], use parameter {{para|nocat|true}}. == Usage == To indicate a template which can be safely used in citation templates: {{COinS safe}} To indicate a template that should '''NOT''' be used in citation templates: {{COinS safe|n}} To add extra info after the standard message: {{para|addtext}} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" |- !style="width: 25%;"| Code !! Result |- | {{tlx|COinS safe}} || {{COinS safe}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|n}} || {{COinS safe|n}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|addtext{{=}}Here is the extra info.}} || {{COinS safe|addtext=Here is the extra info.}} |- | {{tlx|COinS safe|n|addtext{{=}}Here is the extra info.}} || {{COinS safe|n|addtext=Here is the extra info.}} |} == Explain COinS issues == Citation templates such as {{cs1}} and {{cs2}} generate COinS metadata. If a template is used in a citation template field, then it may inject HTML into the metadata. Compare the rendered HTML for {{tl|cite book}} with {{para|author}} using no template and using {{tl|smallcaps}}. {| |- | {{markup |{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}} |{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}} {{code|{{cite book |author=Sam Drucker |title=Title}}}} |{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title}} |{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title | template-doc-demo=true}} {{code|{{cite book |author={{smallcaps|Sam Drucker}} |title=Title}}}} }} |} The author metadata is in the {{code|rft.aulast}} field. In this case, it is percent-encoded and is rendered as Sam Drucker Reference management software will interpret the entire span as the author name. == See also == * [[w:Wikipedia:Citation templates|Wikipedia:Citation templates]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Notice and warning templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
